description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from slats of natural wood, with open gaps between the slats for ventilation and visibility. The box features two oval cut-out handles on the shorter sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The wood displays a range of natural tones, from light tan to medium brown, with visible grain and occasional knots, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The interior is open and unobstructed, suitable for holding various items such as tools, produce, or miscellaneous urban materials. The construction appears sturdy, with the slats securely fastened to the frame, and the open-top design allows for quick access to contents. This type of box is commonly found in urban environments such as markets, garages, or storage areas.
description: A rustic, open-top wooden storage box with slatted sides and oval cut-out handles, showing natural wood grain and tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted face and open top, with the handle cut-outs on the sides partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the oval handle cut-outs and the thickness of the wooden slats.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the slatted construction and open top, with less emphasis on the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle cut-out and the box's depth.
